detail: One of the 2 ancestral mitochondrial mutations needed for mitochondrial Haplogroup H. Haplogroup H has been associated with increased risk of age-related neurological diseases, suggesting that this mutation (or some other) may slightly reduce the effectiveness of mitochondria or humanin.
